sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n113031" key="xalka/nqrwpos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χαλκ-άνθρωπος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n113031.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">copper-man,</tr_> alchemical term in Zos.Alch.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:p.110B" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.110B.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
